# AutonoMath

> 日本の公的制度 (補助金・融資・税制・認定 + 採択事例 + 行政処分 + 法令 + 判例 + 入札 + 適格請求書) を横断検索する REST + MCP API。10,790 active programs (tier S/A/B/C 検索可、tier X = 1,923 quarantine 別) + 2,286 採択事例 + 108 融資 (担保・個人保証人・第三者保証人 三軸) + 1,185 行政処分 + 9,484 laws + 35 tax_rulesets + 2,065 court_decisions + 362 bids + 13,801 invoice_registrants + 503,930 entities / 6.12M facts / 23,805 relations / 335,605 aliases、181 排他/前提ルール、99%+ rows に primary-source URL + fetched_at。MCP 72 tools (protocol 2025-06-18)、¥3/req metered (税込 ¥3.30) 完全従量、匿名 50 req/月 per IP 無料 (JST 月初 00:00 リセット)。

This file follows the emerging llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/) —
a curated, plaintext index of canonical documents for LLM indexers.
Canonical domain: https://autonomath.ai (Bookyou株式会社 / 法人番号 T8010001213708 / info@bookyou.net).
English sibling: https://autonomath.ai/llms.en.txt
Concatenated full docs: https://autonomath.ai/llms-full.txt

## Operator

Bookyou株式会社 (法人番号 T8010001213708) — 代表 梅田茂利 — info@bookyou.net

## Docs

- [Overview / 概要](https://autonomath.ai/docs/): what AutonoMath is, who it is for, position vs Jグランツ
- [Getting started / 5 分クイックスタート](https://autonomath.ai/docs/getting-started/): install, API key, curl/Python/Node examples, Claude Desktop MCP config
- [API reference (REST)](https://autonomath.ai/docs/api-reference/): all REST endpoints, parameters, response shapes
- [MCP tools (72)](https://autonomath.ai/docs/mcp-tools/): 39 jpintel + 33 autonomath stdio tools, 2025-06-18 protocol
- [Examples (Python + curl)](https://autonomath.ai/docs/examples/): copy-paste recipes
- [Error handling](https://autonomath.ai/docs/error_handling/): error codes, retry semantics
- [Exclusion rules](https://autonomath.ai/docs/exclusions/): how subsidy compatibility / exclusivity is modeled
- [FAQ](https://autonomath.ai/docs/faq/): rate limits, data update cadence, SLA, licensing
- [Pricing](https://autonomath.ai/docs/pricing/): ¥3/req 税別 (税込 ¥3.30) 完全従量、匿名 50 req/月 per IP 無料
- [SLA](https://autonomath.ai/docs/sla/): availability target, credit policy, exclusions

## Examples

- [Examples (Python + curl)](https://autonomath.ai/docs/examples/)
- [Try the prescreen widget](https://autonomath.ai/index.html#try)

## MCP server

- PyPI package: `autonomath-mcp` — `pip install autonomath-mcp`
- Console script: `autonomath-mcp` (FastMCP stdio, 72 tools at default gates)
- Repo: https://github.com/Bookyou/autonomath-mcp
- Source dir is legacy `src/jpintel_mcp/` — do not rename (PyPI distribution name is `autonomath-mcp`, import path stays `jpintel_mcp`)

## Data licenses

- e-Gov 法令データ: CC-BY 4.0 (cc_by_4.0)
- NTA 適格請求書発行事業者 bulk: PDL v1.0 (pdl_v1.0, public domain license, redistribution OK with attribution)
- gBizINFO corporate metadata: 政府標準利用規約 (gov_standard)
- Public-domain rows (gazette etc): public_domain
- JST adoption records: proprietary (collected under data-collection phase TOS-allowance)
- Per-row license is exposed via `am_source.license` (97,270 / 97,272 = 99.997% filled)
- Full terms: https://autonomath.ai/tos.html

## Structured data

- [Sitemap index](https://autonomath.ai/sitemap-index.xml): all crawlable URLs
- [Docs sitemap](https://autonomath.ai/docs/sitemap.xml): per-page URLs inside the docs tree
- [Programs sitemap](https://autonomath.ai/sitemap-programs.xml): per-program SEO pages
- Per-program JSON-LD (schema.org GovernmentService / LoanOrCredit) is embedded inline on each `/programs/{id}.html`
